slots.label: The assassination of the dynasty's leader (the JFK archetype)

default.note: Our timeline: President Kennedy is shot in Dallas, 1963.

nazi.note: Occupied America: no presidency to assassinate — a Reichskommissar is purged instead.

kennedy.note: On the Kennedy-dynasty path the slot IS JFK's assassination — the family's defining wound.

trump.note: On the Trump political-dynasty path the martyr is Fred Trump, the patriarch.

musk.note: On the Musk-dynasty path the defining near-death is 2008 — SpaceX's third Falcon 1 failure and Tesla simultaneously running on fumes. The dynasty's near-destruction; the closest technological equivalent to an assassination.

slots.label: The defining financial collapse of the era

default.note: Our timeline: the 1929 Wall Street crash and Great Depression.

nazi.note: Occupied America: the Depression is resolved by Reich command-economy mobilization, not a market crash.

slots.label: The scandal that nearly topples the dynasty

default.note: Our timeline: a Watergate-style press-and-courts scandal.

nazi.note: Occupied America: a Party tribunal for corruption, not a free-press scandal.

theocracy.note: Theocracy: the scandal is framed as heresy / moral fall before the Council of Elders.
